info.name: Phoenix Guardian — SAP Integration API
info.description:
SAP integration API collection for Phoenix Guardian v5.

All SAP endpoints return OData JSON envelopes:
  @odata.context — entity metadata URL
  value          — response payload

Document number formats:
  FICO: FI-5100XXXXX
  MM:   PR-0010XXXXX
  GRC:  GRC-ISSUE-XXXXX
  SAC:  SAC-KPI-XXXXX

Import this file into Postman, set the jwt_token variable, and run.

Project: phoenix-guardian-v4
Docs: docs/SAP_INTEGRATION.md
Architecture: docs/ARCHITECTURE.md

variable.description: Backend URL. Change for deployed environment.
From POST /auth/login. Replace with real token.

request.description:
Authenticate and receive JWT Bearer token.
Copy the token value and set it as the jwt_token collection variable.

item.name: 02 — SAP Integration
item.description:
5 SAP endpoints. All responses use OData JSON envelope format.
Document numbers: FI-5100XXXXX | PR-0010XXXXX | GRC-ISSUE-XXXXX | SAC-KPI-XXXXX

request.description:
Health and document activity for all 4 SAP modules.
No authentication required — health check endpoint.

Returns OData collection:
  @odata.context: $metadata#SAPStatusCollection
  @odata.count: 4
  value: [{FICO}, {MM}, {GRC}, {SAC}]

Each entry: module, status (CONNECTED/DEMO/ERROR), docCountToday, lastDocNumber, endpointUrl

CodingAgent output → SAP S/4HANA FICO customer invoice.

Creates SAP FI document type DR (Debitor Rechnung).
Required roles: PHYSICIAN, ADMIN

SAP OData service: API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV
SAP path: /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV/A_BillingDocument

Expected response:
  DocumentNumber: FI-5100XXXXX
  SAPModule: FICO
  Status: SUCCESS

OrdersAgent + PharmacyAgent → SAP MM Purchase Requisition.

Creates PR type NB (Normal Bestellung) — one line item per medication and lab test.
Required roles: PHYSICIAN, NURSE, ADMIN

SAP OData service: API_PURCHASEREQ_PROCESS_SRV
Line items: medications → Plant HOSP, SL01, GL 510000 | lab → SL02, GL 520000

Expected response:
  DocumentNumber: PR-0010XXXXX
  SAPModule: MM

body.raw:
{
  "patient_id":    "{{patient_id}}",
  "encounter_id":  "{{encounter_id}}",
  "risk_level":    "HIGH",
  "findings":      "NCCI unbundling detected in CPT codes 99213 and 99214",
  "fraud_types":   ["NCCI_UNBUNDLING", "UPCODING"],
  "amount":        45000.00
}

request.description:
FraudAgent → SAP GRC compliance issue.

Severity mapping: CRITICAL=1 | HIGH=2 | MEDIUM=3 | LOW=4 | INFO=5
Control Objective: CO_BILLING_ACCURACY
Required roles: ADMIN only

SAP OData service: GRC_PI_RISKMANAGEMENT_SRV

Expected response:
  DocumentNumber: GRC-ISSUE-XXXXX
  SAPModule: GRC

PopulationHealthAgent + ReadmissionAgent → SAP Analytics Cloud.

Updates PHOENIX_HOSPITAL_KPI dataset — triggers live SAC dashboard refresh.
Required roles: ADMIN, PHYSICIAN
KPIs pushed: 9 metrics (patient ops + SAP ERP document counters)

Expected response:
  DocumentNumber: SAC-KPI-XXXXX
  SAPModule: SAC

item.name: 03 — OData Clinical APIs
item.description:
OData-compatible endpoints supporting $top $skip $filter $orderby $expand.
Responses use SAP OData envelope: @odata.context + @odata.count + value[]
